name: Command palette (browser-native)
algorithm: Cmd/Ctrl-K toggles a native <dialog>. showModal() provides modality, background inertness, and the focus trap. The input (role=combobox) filters commands by substring; Arrow/Home/End move an active option communicated via aria-activedescendant over a role=listbox. Enter or tap runs the active command after closing; Escape (native cancel) closes and restores focus to the trigger.
reduced_motion: Open/backdrop reveal keyframes disabled under prefers-reduced-motion; palette appears instantly.
responsive_behaviour: panel min(40rem, 100vw - 2rem); options are 44px full-width tap targets; list scrolls within 60vh
browser_support: Evergreen browsers and Safari 15.4+ for dialog.showModal()/::backdrop; degrades to open attribute and manual focus restoration.
accessibility: Native dialog modality; combobox/listbox with aria-activedescendant keeps focus on the input; Escape restores focus to the trigger; forced-colors keeps the active option visible.
